subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath, in most of the Tablets, enjoined wisdom upon the loved ones of God, and hath established it as the foundation of foundations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در اکثری از الواح احبای الهی را بحکمت امر فرموده و حکمت را اس اساس
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @wisdom [hikmat], @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
